payload.query: mutation($meteringPointId: String!, $businessReason: ChangeOfSupplierBusinessReason!, $startDate: DateTime!, $customerIdentification: CustomerIdentificationInput!, $customerName: String!, $energySupplier: String!) { initiateMoveIn(input: { meteringPointId: $meteringPointId, businessReason: $businessReason, startDate: $startDate, customerIdentification: $customerIdentification, customerName: $customerName, energySupplier: $energySupplier }) { boolean } }
